summary: Silent SOS Emergency Feature: Complete testing of all backend API endpoints and frontend login flows. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All login flows working correctly.

backend_api.POST /api/emergency/silent-sos: PASS - Creates emergency with event_id, status=active, severity_level=2
backend_api.POST /api/emergency/location-update: PASS - Updates location trail for active emergency
backend_api.POST /api/emergency/cancel (correct PIN): PASS - Cancels emergency with correct PIN
backend_api.POST /api/emergency/cancel (wrong PIN): PASS - Returns 400 with 'Invalid cancellation PIN' error
backend_api.POST /api/emergency/resolve: PASS - Resolves emergency with duration_seconds and location_updates
backend_api.GET /api/emergency/status/{event_id}: PASS - Returns full details with location_trail
backend_api.double_trigger_test: PASS - Two triggers create two separate events

frontend_ui.login_page_loads: PASS - Nagarik branding, Family/Operator tabs visible
frontend_ui.operator_dashboard: PASS - All navigation items visible (Dashboard, Incidents, Device Health, etc.)
frontend_ui.guardian_dashboard: PASS - Overview, Safety Monitor, Safety Score, Incidents, Seniors, Settings

critical_code_review_comments: Emergency API correctly implements PIN hashing with SHA-256 for secure cancel verification
Location trail properly appends updates with timestamps
Redis caching used for fast emergency status lookups
Operators see all active emergencies, users see only their own (RBAC working)
Push notification and SMS notification to guardians implemented (3 guardians notified per test)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test emergencies during pytest - all cleaned up via resolve endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Silent SOS feature fully tested. All 4 main endpoints (silent-sos, location-update, cancel, resolve) plus active list and status endpoints verified. Key behaviors: (1) PIN hashing prevents attacker cancellation, (2) Wrong PIN returns 400 error, (3) Double trigger creates separate events, (4) Location trail accumulates updates, (5) Operators see all emergencies via RBAC, (6) guardians_notified field shows 3 guardians being notified per emergency.

mocked_apis_list: Push notifications (FCM) and SMS (Twilio trial) may fail for unverified numbers. Guardian notification attempted but actual delivery depends on device tokens and Twilio verification.

verified_endpoints: POST /api/emergency/silent-sos - Trigger SOS with lat, lng, trigger_source, cancel_pin, device_metadata
POST /api/emergency/location-update - Update location during active emergency
POST /api/emergency/cancel - Cancel with correct PIN (reject wrong PIN)
GET /api/emergency/status/{event_id} - Full emergency details with location trail
